de.uka.ilkd.key.rule

Class AbstractLoopContractRule

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.AbstractLoopContractRule
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    BuiltInRule, Rule
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    LoopContractExternalRule, LoopContractInternalRule

    public abstract class AbstractLoopContractRule
extends AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule

    Rule for the application of LoopContracts.

    See Also:
    AbstractLoopContractBuiltInRuleApp

    • Method Detail

      • getApplicableContracts

        public static ImmutableSet<LoopContract> getApplicableContracts(AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule.Instantiation instantiation,
                                                                Goal goal,
                                                                Services services)
        Parameters:
        instantiation - an instantiation.
        goal - the current goal.
        services - services.
        Returns:
        all applicable loop contracts for the instantiation.

      • getApplicableContracts

        public static ImmutableSet<LoopContract> getApplicableContracts(SpecificationRepository specifications,
                                                                JavaStatement statement,
                                                                Modality modality,
                                                                Goal goal)
        Parameters:
        specifications - a specification repository.
        statement - a statement.
        modality - the current goal's modality.
        goal - the current goal.
        Returns:
        all applicable loop contracts for the block from the repository.

      • filterAppliedContracts

        protected static ImmutableSet<LoopContract> filterAppliedContracts(ImmutableSet<LoopContract> collectedContracts,
                                                                   Goal goal)
        Parameters:
        collectedContracts - a set of loop contracts.
        goal - the current goal.
        Returns:
        the set with all non-applicable contracts filtered out.

      • contractApplied

        protected static boolean contractApplied(LoopContract contract,
                                         Goal goal)
        Parameters:
        contract - a loop contract.
        goal - the current goal.
        Returns:
        true if the contract has already been applied.

      • isApplicable

        public boolean isApplicable(Goal goal,
                            PosInOccurrence occurrence)
        Description copied from interface: BuiltInRule
        returns true iff a rule is applicable at the given position. This does not necessarily mean that a rule application will change the goal (this decision is made due to performance reasons)

      • instantiate

        public AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule.Instantiation instantiate(Term formula,
                                                               Goal goal,
                                                               Services services)
        Parameters:
        formula - the formula on which the rule is to be applied.
        goal - the current goal.
        services - services.
        Returns:
        a new instantiation.

      • createAndRegisterAnonymisationVariables

        protected java.util.Map<LocationVariable,Function> createAndRegisterAnonymisationVariables(java.lang.Iterable<LocationVariable> variables,
                                                                                           LoopContract contract,
                                                                                           TermServices services)
        Parameters:
        variables - variables.
        contract - a loop contract.
        services - services.
        Returns:
        a map from every variable that is changed in the block to its anonymization constant.
